metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional metadata for extended request information

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest
ChatRequest.description:
Request model for chat endpoint.

Attributes:
    message: The user's message/query
    session_id: Optional session identifier for conversation tracking
    user_id: Optional user identifier for multi-user support
    metadata: Optional metadata dictionary for extended request information

ChatResponse.title: ChatResponse
ChatResponse.description:
Response model for chat endpoint.

Attributes:
    response: The chatbot's response message
    session_id: The session ID for this conversation
    timestamp: When the response was generated
    message_id: Unique identifier for this message exchange

examples.response: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn from data.

resource_id.title: Resource Id
resource_id.description: Optional identifier of the deleted resource

DeleteResponse.title: DeleteResponse
DeleteResponse.description:
Delete response model.

Attributes:
    deleted: Whether the resource was successfully deleted
    message: Confirmation message about the deletion
    resource_id: Optional identifier of the deleted resource

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description:
Error response model.

Attributes:
    error: Error message
    detail: Detailed error information
    status_code: HTTP status code

examples.detail: Session ID sess_invalid does not exist

MessageListResponse.title: MessageListResponse
MessageListResponse.description:
Response model for message list endpoint.

Attributes:
    root: List of messages from a session

examples.content: I'm doing well, thank you for asking!

ProviderInfo.title: ProviderInfo
ProviderInfo.description:
Provider availability information.

Attributes:
    available: List of available providers
    unavailable: List of unavailable providers

ProviderSetupStep.title: ProviderSetupStep
ProviderSetupStep.description:
A step in provider setup instructions.

Attributes:
    step: Step number or order
    title: Step title
    instruction: Detailed instruction
    code: Optional code snippet or command

examples.code: # No code needed for this step
examples.instruction: Visit Groq console and create an account
examples.title: Create Account

ProviderStatus.title: ProviderStatus
ProviderStatus.description:
Status of a single LLM provider.

Attributes:
    name: Provider name (e.g., "groq", "openai")
    reason: Status reason/explanation

SessionInfo.title: SessionInfo
SessionInfo.description:
Session information model.

Attributes:
    id: The session identifier
    message_count: Number of messages in this session
    created_at: When the session was created
    last_accessed: When the session was last accessed
    user_id: Optional user ID associated with session

SetupHelpResponse.title: SetupHelpResponse
SetupHelpResponse.description:
Detailed setup help for a specific provider.

Attributes:
    provider: Provider name
    title: Setup title
    description: Provider description
    documentation_url: Link to provider documentation
    steps: List of setup steps
    pricing_info: Pricing information
    troubleshooting: Troubleshooting tips

examples.description: Groq provides fast, free LLM inference via API

steps.instruction: Visit Groq console and create an account
steps.title: Create Account

examples.title: Setup Groq (FREE, Recommended)

status.title: Status
status.description: Setup status: configured, needs_setup, or error

SetupStatusResponse.title: SetupStatusResponse
SetupStatusResponse.description:
Setup status and diagnostics response.

Attributes:
    status: Overall setup status ("configured", "needs_setup", or "error")
    message: Human-readable status message
    providers: Information about available/unavailable providers
    setup_guide: Optional setup instructions
    quick_start: Optional quick start guide

examples.setup_guide: Your system is ready to use Groq...

steps: 2. Sign up and get API key
